title: Section 97A
content: 1[97A. Prohibition against discrimination.--There shall be no discrimination between seamen,-- (a) on the ground of their membership or lack of membership in any particular union purporting to represent the interests of seamen and membership in such union shall not be pre-requisite condition; (b) on the basis of training institute from where they obtained training or place of issue of their continuous discharge certificates, for their recruitment and engagement on board any ship.]
